title: delarbrea montana subsp. arborea
intro: Delarbrea montana subsp. arborea, also known as the tree daisy bush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Delarbrea montana subsp. arborea is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential interactions.
